situations.label: Scheduled maintenance – planned, known ahead
situations.where: Affected flow + dashboard note; whole-app also on status page + social

byPlacement.payments:
### Scheduled update
Payments will be briefly unavailable {schedule}.
byPlacement.exchange:
### Scheduled update
Swaps will be briefly unavailable {schedule}.
byPlacement.deposit:
### Scheduled update
Deposits will be briefly unavailable {schedule}.
byPlacement.features:
### Scheduled update
Some features will be briefly unavailable {schedule}.
byPlacement.app:
### Scheduled update
Trezu will be briefly unavailable {schedule}.
Your funds are on-chain and in your control.

byPlacement.payments:
### Scheduled provider maintenance
Payments may be briefly unavailable {schedule}. Your funds are on-chain and in your control.
byPlacement.exchange:
### Scheduled provider maintenance
Swaps may be briefly unavailable {schedule}. Your funds are on-chain and in your control.
byPlacement.deposit:
### Scheduled provider maintenance
Deposits may be briefly unavailable {schedule}. Your funds are on-chain and in your control.
byPlacement.features:
### Scheduled provider maintenance
Some features may be briefly unavailable {schedule}. Your funds are on-chain and in your control.

situations.label: Network or token slow – still works, just slower
situations.where: In the flow, when that token or network is selected
situations.message:
### {subject} is slow right now
Your {action} will go through once it recovers, it just may take longer than usual.

situations.label: Token or network paused – one token, one network, or both
situations.where: In the flow, when that token or network is selected

messagesByScope.token:
### {token} is paused right now
Other tokens work as normal.
messagesByScope.network:
### {network} is paused right now
You can use a different network in the meantime.
messagesByScope.token+network:
### {token} on {network} is paused right now
Other tokens work as normal.

situations.label: Feature pages down – payments / exchange / deposit

byPlacement.payments:
### Payments are temporarily paused.
We're working on it.
byPlacement.exchange:
### Exchange is temporarily paused.
We're working on it.
byPlacement.deposit:
### Deposits are temporarily paused.
We're working on it.
byPlacement.features:
### Some features are temporarily paused.
We're working on it.

situations.label: Everything halted – Intents fully down, nothing can move
situations.message:
### Transactions are paused right now
A network provider is recovering. Your funds are on-chain and in your control. Updates: {statusPageLink}

situations.label: Balances not showing – display issue, money untouched
situations.where: Pop-up once → dashboard balance area + sidebar
situations.message:
### Balance temporarily unavailable.
We can't show your balances right now. Your funds are on-chain and exactly where you left them. You can keep using your treasury.

situations.label: History not loading – display issue
situations.message:
### Transaction history isn't loading right now
This affects what you can see, not your funds or your treasury.

situations.label: Requests won't process – can't create or send
situations.where: Create request buttons and Approve / Reject / Remove
situations.message: Can't process new requests for a few minutes – a temporary network issue. Your funds are unaffected, try again shortly.

situations.label: Approvals paused – pending requests can't be approved
situations.message:
Approving requests is paused right now while a network provider recovers.
 You can still reject pending requests, and approvals will work again once it's back.

situations.label: Wallet login unavailable – a wallet provider is down
situations.where: Login screen – all wallets banner, or Offline badge on one wallet

byPlacement.login:
### Signing in isn't available right now.
Your funds are on-chain and untouched – you can sign in again once it's back.
byPlacement.login.wallet.*:
### Signing in with {wallet} isn't available right now.
Your funds are on-chain and untouched – you can sign in again once it's back.

situations.label: Backend down – data won't load
situations.message:
### We're having a temporary issue
Some data may not load. Your funds are on-chain and unaffected – try again shortly.

situations.label: Whole app down – Trezu won't load at all
situations.where: Status page + social + landing (outside the app)
situations.message:
### Trezu is temporarily down.
Your funds are on-chain and in your control. Updates: {statusPageLink}

situations.label: Treasury creation unavailable – show waitlist
situations.message: Creating new treasuries is invite-only for now. Join the waitlist and we'll let you know when it opens up.

situations.label: Funds may be at risk – STOP
situations.message:
### We've paused Trezu while we investigate an issue.
We recommend not making any transactions until we confirm everything's clear. Updates: {statusPageLink}
